title: crassulaceae
intro: The Crassulaceae rank refers to a family of plants, commonly known as the stonecrop or orpine family. This family comprises about 1,400 species of flowering plants, which are predominantly succulents and have thick, fleshy leaves that store water. Many members of the Crassulaceae family are popular ornamental plants, prized for their attractive foliage and vibrant flowers. They can be found in various parts of the world, including Europe, Asia, and North America, often thriving in dry and rocky environments.
